summary: ITER 34 — CORS cleanup + billing_country + PriceSummary GREEN. Backend pytest 8/8 PASS (new iter_34) + 6/6 iter_33 regression PASS. Frontend Playwright ALL checks pass: PriceSummary component (wl-price-summary, wl-country with 19 options, wl-price-ht, wl-price-ttc) renders correctly on step 2 of WhiteLabel wizard. FR/BE/LU VAT switching verified: 50 sièges × 19€ = 950€ HT → FR(20%)=1140€ TTC, BE(21%)=1149,50€ TTC, LU(17%)=1111,50€ TTC. HT stays constant when country changes. Backend POST /api/admin/whitelabel/create accepts billing_country='BE' and persists it; GET /api/admin/whitelabel/list returns it correctly. Default 'FR' applied when omitted. All Bearer-token auth flows still work after credentials:'include' removal: login (200+token), /auth/me (200+email), /admin/check (200), /auth/logout (200). accept-invite regression returns clean 4xx for invalid token (no 5xx).

minor.issue: AI scan can take 30-45s on iadfrance.fr (no regression, observed in iter 33 too)

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js line 47 still has `credentials: token ? 'omit' : 'include'` — this is acceptable as a fallback for OAuth cookie-session path on first /auth/me call when no Bearer token exists. Total credentials:'include' occurrences in src/ went from 7 to 1 (only this fallback remains).

WhiteLabelTab.js PriceSummary is well-isolated component (~lines 376-463), VAT_RATES properly typed (19 entries with code/label/vat fields), VAT calculation in cents (Math.round to avoid FP drift) — clean implementation.
Same recurring observation as iter_28+/33: /app/backend/server.py exceeds 7400 lines — splitting whitelabel + billing + branding into routers/whitelabel.py would improve maintainability.
monthly_price_per_seat_eur field name misleading (stored in cents) — same observation as iter_32/33.
billing_country has no Pydantic validation (any 2-letter code accepted) — could be tightened to enum of allowed ISO-2 codes matching VAT_RATES on backend. Low priority since UI controls the input.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — PriceSummary on step 2 of WhiteLabel wizard: 19 country options including FR/BE/LU/CH/DE; FR 950€/1140€, BE 950€/1149,50€, LU 950€/1111,50€ TTC verified; HT constant on country change; super admin login + Bearer-only auth path works

test_credentials: Super admin elliot.cohenpressard@trykolo.io / Psychologue75007%! works. Token returned at top-level of /api/auth/login response (not nested under user).
seed_data_creation: iter_34 creates 2 short-lived orgs (audit-bc-* with billing_country=BE, audit-bc-fr-* with default FR) per pytest run, auto-cleaned via class-scoped fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter_34 GREEN. To re-test: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_34.py /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_33.py -v` (≤8s for the iter_34 set, +6s for iter_33 AI scan). For frontend probe: login as super admin → /kolo-admin → Marque blanche tab → fill whitelabel-url-input with https://www.iadfrance.fr → click whitelabel-scan-btn → wait 30-60s for AI scan → step 2 wizard shows wl-price-summary with wl-country/wl-price-ht/wl-price-ttc. Field component renders <input data-testid={testid}> directly so fill via [data-testid='wl-seats'] (no nested input selector). The login response contains token+email at top-level (NOT nested under .user — adjusted assertion accordingly).
rca of the issue: NO BUGS. Backend WhiteLabelCreatePayload.billing_country (Optional[str]='FR') on line 6012 is correctly persisted at line 6048 as .upper(). Frontend PriceSummary at lines 376-463 of WhiteLabelTab.js calculates: htCents=seats*pricePerSeatCents, vatCents=Math.round(htCents*vatPct/100), ttcCents=htCents+vatCents — all values match expected output. VAT_RATES array (line 349) has exactly 19 entries with the 5 key countries the problem statement requires (FR=20, BE=21, LU=17, CH=8.1, DE=19). CORS cleanup verified: 7 credentials:'include' → 1 remaining in AuthContext.js line 47 as legitimate OAuth fallback when no Bearer token exists. All 4 auth flows (login/me/logout/admin-check) work with Bearer-only.
